creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 160504
ftp/filezilla update to 3.13.1

Update ftp/filezilla to 3.13.1 which fixes the build system and allows dropping the mess of patches added for the prior update.

A week ago I asked upstream about plans for a .0.1 release as they've had a few .0.1 and .0.2 releases recently for build issues. The reply was that there is no plan for a .0.1 release. Turns out they release a .1 update before the .0 got committed. So, another PR but at least the patch mess goes away.
